text: Confirming Lancaster Airbnb check-in Friday afternoon — I'll have the toast draft printed by then.
You are a lifesaver. Send me the toast draft when you're comfortable — no rush.
This week is a lot. Rain check on Saturday — I'll circle back after the annual review.
Also — final headcount for the rehearsal dinner is 18 confirmed, 2 tentative. Should I share the spreadsheet with your mom?

Got it. I'll pick her up at 1:30 and text you after.
Parents — quick reminder that Halloween showcase costume fittings are Saturday 10am at the studio. Please have shoes clean and hair prepped.
All good. Take care of yourself first. We'll figure the rest out.
